---
title: "Juliana Horatia Ewing"
---

## Juliana Horatia Ewing

**Dates:** (1841-1885)

**Maiden name:** (Gatty)

### Description

novelist, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1861-93)

### Biography

She married ([ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from June 10th 1885
- Letter from May 4th [1882?][[footnote:2]]
- Letter from [“early” 1866] [[footnote:1]]
- Letter from May 22nd [1863-7]
- Letter from Aug 8th [1862]
- Letter from Aug 6th [1862]
- Letter from [September 1861]
- Letter from May 22nd [1861] 
- Letter from [1861]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
